title: lapsana communis var. macrocarpa
intro: Lapsana communis var. macrocarpa, also known as the large-fruited navelwort or large-fruited prick-madam, is a variety of the Lapsana communis plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which have been used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lapsana communis var. macrocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and infusions made from its leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
